author: cms-sw
body:
By default `rpmbuild` and `rpmdeps` use all the available cores. This was not a issue when we build on 16 core build nodes but building on large achine with ngt highcore machine with 786 core this can break builds as this can hit other limits ( number of open files, number of processes run by a user etc.). 

This PR proposes to set `_smp_build_nthreads` macro which limits the cores used by `rpmbuild` and OPENMP related env to control the core/threads used by `rpmdeps`.
title: Control the number of core used by rpmbuild and rpmdeps
